steps.title: Use the context after the blank
steps.content: Visitors already have an art-viewing experience at the museum, and the sentence suggests turning to Chicago's streets to find more works. The needed word should mean adding to an existing experience.

steps.title: Match the idea of adding
steps.content: Choice A means lessen, which contradicts seeking more art. Choice B suggests fulfillment rather than extension. Choice C means provoke or stimulate, not add to. The word that means make more complete by adding something fits the sentence. The answer is D.
